name: Rebelião
flavor: Armed with smuggled weapons, the oppressed populace prepares to rise against their occupiers!

history_events.begin: The people of this settlement have risen in rebellion against their occupiers!
history_events.success: A rebelião foi um sucesso! O assentamento foi libertado da ocupação. ::deaths caíram na luta.
history_events.failure: The rebellion has been crushed. The occupiers maintain control of the settlement. ::deaths fell in the fighting.
